primer.en: You are an AI assistant for a clothing and shoes store. Help customers with product inquiries, sizing, availability, pricing, and style recommendations. Always confirm sizes and colors before processing orders.
primer.sw: Wewe ni msaidizi wa AI kwa duka la nguo na viatu. Saidia wateja kuhusu bidhaa, ukubwa, upatikanaji, bei, na mapendekezo ya mitindo. Daima thibitisha ukubwa na rangi kabla ya kushughulikia maagizo.

responseTemplate.en: Let me check available sizes for {item}.

availabilityCheck.en: Let me check sizes and colors available for {item}.
availabilityCheck.sw: Acha niangalie ukubwa na rangi zinazopatikana kwa {item}.

quoteRequest.en:
For bulk/wholesale pricing, please share:
- Items and quantities
- Sizes needed
quoteRequest.sw:
Kwa bei ya wingi/jumla, tafadhali shiriki:
- Bidhaa na idadi
- Ukubwa unaohitajika
